joshua-tree.name: U.S.S. Joshua Tree
joshua-tree.description: A New Orleans class frigate serving as the primary vessel for deep-space exploration and tactical operations in the Hellmouth Sector. Commissioned stardate 3333.3349, the Joshua Tree carries a crew of specialists drawn from across the Federation. Under the command of Captain Calo B. Rodriguez, she has become a key asset in charting the dangers of this uncharted region of space.

king.name: U.S.S. King
king.description: A Prometheus-class multi-vector assault vessel assigned to the Fleet of Admiral Ryvikarri. Capable of separating into three independent warp-capable sections for tactical superiority. One of Starfleet's most advanced warships, the King serves as the fleet's primary combat deterrent in the Hellmouth Sector.

defiant-a.name: U.S.S. Defiant-A
defiant-a.description: A Defiant-class escort vessel, compact and heavily armed. Originally designed for combat operations against the Dominion, the Defiant-A now serves as a rapid-response ship in the Hellmouth Sector. Her small size belies her devastating firepower and ablative armor plating.

lancelot.name: U.S.S. Lancelot
lancelot.description: A Sovereign-class explorer, among the most advanced starships in the fleet. Designed for long-range exploration and diplomatic missions, the Lancelot brings both scientific capability and formidable tactical systems to the Hellmouth Sector. She serves as the fleet's flagship for first contact situations.
